prompt: Generate a computer graphics visualization showing the detailed cat face from image 2 placed before the uneven red brick wall texture of image 1. The image should explicitly depict the scene's resulting depth map, using a visual style common in computer graphics depth map representations.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics depth map visualization featuring the detailed grey cat face with bright blue eyes and prominent whiskers from image 2 placed centrally in the foreground. This cat face should be clearly positioned in front of the uneven reddish-brown brick wall with distinct mortar lines from image 1, which forms the background. The resulting image must explicitly depict the scene's depth map, rendered in a standard grayscale computer graphics style where lighter values represent closer objects and darker values represent objects further away.
objects: Detailed grey cat face centrally placed in the foreground
Uneven reddish-brown brick wall forming the background
